inline_comments.message:
It would be good to implment this in a way that is consistent with how the property value is handled, i.e. passed to the backend as a string and converted to correct type during generation of the toscs template (see PropertyConvertor::convertProperty() where is call convertToToscaObject())

You could argue if this is the best approach or not, but given its what is already there for handling values we should be consistent
